metadata.note: Output used as-is without manual revision or selection.

causal_texts: The glass slipped from Alice's hand. The glass fell to the floor. The glass broke into many pieces. The glass left a wet stain on the tile floor.

The young chef grabbed a sharp knife from the wooden drawer. The young chef chopped fresh green vegetables on the thick board. The young chef accidentally cut a finger on the left hand. The young chef wrapped a white medical bandage around the injured finger.

The fierce storm gathered dark heavy clouds over the coastal city. The fierce storm unleashed pouring rain upon the empty paved streets. The fierce storm flooded the entire downtown area with deep water. The fierce storm caused massive structural damage to many local businesses.

The stray dog smelled a delicious meaty bone near the trash. The stray dog dug through the dirty plastic garbage bags. The stray dog found the large beef bone in the pile. The stray dog ate the tasty meal with great eager excitement.

The racing car blew a rubber tire on the sharp turn. The racing car spun wildly across the smooth paved racing track. The racing car smashed into the concrete safety barrier at high speed. The racing car caught fire in a spectacular bright fiery explosion.

The little bird built a soft warm nest in the oak tree. The little bird laid three small blue eggs in the nest. The little bird sat on the fragile eggs for many days. The little bird welcomed three tiny hungry chicks into the world.

The brave knight drew a heavy iron sword from the scabbard. The brave knight charged at the green dragon with great speed. The brave knight struck the giant beast on the thick scaly neck. The brave knight defeated the terrifying scary monster in a fierce battle.

The old bridge weakened during the massive winter river flood. The old bridge groaned under the immense weight of the rushing water. The old bridge collapsed into the deep muddy river far below. The old bridge blocked all boat cargo traffic on the wide river.

The tired student drank a large hot cup of black coffee. The tired student opened the heavy science textbook on the wooden desk. The tired student read three long chapters in the quiet public library. The tired student finished the difficult math assignment before the midnight deadline.

The space rocket launched from the concrete pad with massive force. The space rocket broke through the thick heavy atmosphere of the earth. The space rocket entered a stable circular orbit around the blue planet. The space rocket deployed a shiny metal satellite into the dark void.

The hungry bear woke from a long deep winter hibernation sleep. The hungry bear left the dark rocky cave in the forest. The hungry bear caught a large silver salmon in the cold river. The hungry bear ate the fresh raw fish on the grassy riverbank.

The tall pine tree caught fire from a bright lightning strike. The tall pine tree burned intensely in the dry summer heat. The tall pine tree lost all the green needles to the flames. The tall pine tree crashed down onto the dry forest floor.

The passenger train derailed near the steep mountain rocky pass. The passenger train slid off the shiny metal tracks into the snow. The passenger train sustained heavy metal damage to the front engine. The passenger train trapped fifty scared passengers in the cold passenger cars.

The old pirate ship encountered a massive violent ocean hurricane. The old pirate ship suffered a broken main wooden mast. The old pirate ship took on heavy seawater through a large hole. The old pirate ship sank to the bottom of the deep ocean.

The small airplane experienced a sudden catastrophic engine failure. The small airplane lost altitude rapidly in the clear blue sky. The small airplane crash-landed in a wide empty corn field. The small airplane suffered extensive damage to the left metal wing.

The computer programmer typed a complex code on the mechanical keyboard. The computer programmer ran the new software program on the server. The computer programmer discovered a major critical error in the main system. The computer programmer spent five long hours fixing the difficult software bug.

The professional photographer loaded fresh film into the vintage camera. The professional photographer took a beautiful picture of the setting sun. The professional photographer developed the raw film in the dark room. The professional photographer framed the stunning landscape print in a wooden frame.

The mountain climber packed a heavy green backpack with essential gear. The mountain climber ascended the steep icy cliff with sharp tools. The mountain climber reached the high snowy peak of the tall mountain. The mountain climber planted a bright red flag in the cold snow.

The wild tiger stalked a slow deer through the tall grass. The wild tiger pounced on the unsuspecting prey with sharp claws. The wild tiger dragged the heavy meal into the thick jungle bushes. The wild tiger consumed the fresh meat in complete utter silence.

The farm tractor ran out of diesel fuel in the large field. The farm tractor stopped moving completely in the muddy brown soil. The farm tractor blocked the narrow dirt path for the other vehicles. The farm tractor required a heavy tow truck for an immediate rescue.

The angry customer yelled at the frightened young store clerk. The angry customer demanded a full cash refund for the broken item. The angry customer threw the damaged plastic toy on the glass counter. The angry customer stormed out of the small retail shop in a rage.

The famous singer stepped onto the brightly lit wooden stage. The famous singer sang a beautiful emotional song into the metal microphone. The famous singer received a loud standing ovation from the giant crowd. The famous singer bowed deeply to the cheering excited fans.

The delivery driver loaded fifty cardboard boxes into the white van. The delivery driver drove the white van across the busy city. The delivery driver dropped a heavy box on the concrete sidewalk. The delivery driver broke the fragile glass items inside the cardboard box.

The police officer spotted a stolen blue car on the highway. The police officer chased the stolen blue car at high speeds. The police officer forced the stolen blue car off the paved road. The police officer arrested the dangerous criminal in the stolen blue car.

The curious cat spotted a small brown mouse in the kitchen. The curious cat chased the small brown mouse under the wooden table. The curious cat caught the small brown mouse with sharp front claws. The curious cat brought the small brown mouse to the living room.

The large cargo ship hit a massive hidden ice berg. The large cargo ship tore a huge hole in the steel hull. The large cargo ship filled with freezing cold ocean water. The large cargo ship disappeared beneath the dark violent ocean waves.

The young boy threw a hard baseball toward the neighbor's house. The young boy shattered a large glass window in the living room. The young boy heard a loud angry shout from the neighbor's house. The young boy ran away down the street in absolute pure terror.

The experienced doctor examined the sick patient in the bright clinic. The experienced doctor diagnosed the sick patient with a severe viral infection. The experienced doctor prescribed strong antibiotics for the sick patient. The experienced doctor sent the sick patient home for immediate bed rest.

The fierce lion roared loudly at the approaching rival male. The fierce lion charged at the approaching rival male with bared teeth. The fierce lion bit the approaching rival male on the thick neck. The fierce lion chased the defeated rival male away from the pride.

The heavy snow buried the small mountain cabin up to the roof. The heavy snow blocked the only wooden door of the small mountain cabin. The heavy snow trapped the scared family inside the small mountain cabin. The heavy snow collapsed the old wooden roof of the small mountain cabin.

The cunning thief picked the metal lock on the front door. The cunning thief entered the dark silent house through the open door. The cunning thief stole expensive shiny jewelry from the master bedroom. The cunning thief escaped into the dark quiet night with the expensive shiny jewelry.

The bright sun melted the thick white snow on the high mountains. The bright sun created a rushing stream of cold clear water. The bright sun flooded the small green valley with cold clear water. The bright sun destroyed the small village crops in the small green valley.

The clumsy waiter tripped over a chair leg in the dining room. The clumsy waiter dropped a large tray of hot food on the floor. The clumsy waiter spilled hot red soup all over a furious customer. The clumsy waiter apologized profusely to the furious angry customer.

The young girl planted a small apple seed in the rich soil. The young girl watered the small apple seed every single morning. The young girl watched a tiny green sprout emerge from the rich soil. The young girl grew a beautiful large apple tree in the backyard.

The wild horse bucked wildly in the dusty wooden corral. The wild horse threw the brave cowboy off the leather saddle. The wild horse kicked the wooden fence with powerful back legs. The wild horse broke the wooden fence into many small sharp splinters.

The strong earthquake shook the ancient stone temple with immense force. The strong earthquake cracked the large stone pillars of the ancient stone temple. The strong earthquake collapsed the heavy stone roof of the ancient stone temple. The strong earthquake reduced the ancient stone temple to a pile of rubble.

The busy baker mixed white flour and warm water in a bowl. The busy baker kneaded the sticky dough on the wooden table. The busy baker baked the sticky dough in a hot brick oven. The busy baker sold the fresh warm bread to a happy customer.

The aggressive shark smelled fresh red blood in the ocean water. The aggressive shark swam rapidly toward the injured floating seal. The aggressive shark bit the injured floating seal with rows of sharp teeth. The aggressive shark devoured the injured floating seal in mere seconds.

The loud thunder scared the small nervous dog in the house. The loud thunder caused the small nervous dog to hide under the bed. The loud thunder shook the glass windows of the small quiet house. The loud thunder kept the small nervous dog awake all night.

The experienced pilot steered the large passenger jet onto the long runway. The experienced pilot pushed the engine throttles to maximum takeoff power. The experienced pilot lifted the large passenger jet into the cloudy sky. The experienced pilot reached cruising altitude above the thick grey clouds.

The old washing machine made a loud grinding noise in the basement. The old washing machine stopped spinning the wet dirty clothes. The old washing machine leaked soapy water all over the concrete floor. The old washing machine caused a huge messy flood in the basement.

The hungry spider spun a sticky silken web between two green branches. The hungry spider caught a flying fat fly in the sticky silken web. The hungry spider wrapped the flying fat fly in thick white silk. The hungry spider consumed the flying fat fly in the quiet garden.

The massive volcano erupted with a loud terrifying explosion. The massive volcano spewed hot liquid magma high into the dark sky. The massive volcano covered the green mountain with thick grey ash. The massive volcano destroyed the nearby town with a fast lava flow.

The skilled surgeon sterilized a sharp metal scalpel in the operating room. The skilled surgeon made a precise clean incision on the patient's chest. The skilled surgeon repaired the damaged beating heart with great extreme care. The skilled surgeon saved the patient's life with the complex medical procedure.

The young boy built a tall tower of colorful plastic blocks. The young boy added a large red plastic block to the very top. The young boy bumped the small wooden table with a careless elbow. The young boy knocked the tall tower of colorful plastic blocks to the floor.

The fast cheetah sprinted across the dry yellow savanna grass. The fast cheetah caught a young gazelle by the hind leg. The fast cheetah brought the young gazelle to the dusty ground. The fast cheetah dragged the young gazelle to a shady acacia tree.

The sharp needle pierced the thick blue denim fabric. The sharp needle pulled a strong white thread through the thick blue denim fabric. The sharp needle joined two pieces of thick blue denim fabric together. The sharp needle created a strong durable seam on the blue jeans.

The heavy bowling ball rolled smoothly down the shiny wooden lane. The heavy bowling ball curved slightly toward the center wooden pins. The heavy bowling ball struck the center wooden pins with a loud crash. The heavy bowling ball knocked all the center wooden pins to the floor.

The small match ignited a dry pile of crisp autumn leaves. The small match started a warm bright fire in the metal pit. The small match burned the dry pile of crisp autumn leaves to grey ash. The small match left only warm glowing embers in the metal pit.

The venomous snake bit the tall hiker on the lower leg. The venomous snake injected deadly toxic venom into the tall hiker's bloodstream. The venomous snake caused severe sharp pain in the tall hiker's lower leg. The venomous snake sent the tall hiker to the emergency hospital room.

The hot iron burned a large triangular hole in the white shirt. The hot iron ruined the expensive silk fabric completely. The hot iron melted the plastic buttons on the white shirt. The hot iron caused a terrible horrible smell in the laundry room.

The old grandfather clock stopped ticking in the silent hallway. The old grandfather clock showed the incorrect time on the brass face. The old grandfather clock failed to chime at the top of the hour. The old grandfather clock needed a professional repair by a skilled horologist.

The wild tornado touched down in the middle of the empty field. The wild tornado tore the wooden roof off the red barn. The wild tornado threw the wooden roof pieces into the dark sky. The wild tornado left a path of total destruction across the farm.

The heavy textbook fell from the top wooden shelf. The heavy textbook hit the distracted student on the top of the head. The heavy textbook caused a large painful bump on the distracted student's head. The heavy textbook gave the distracted student a terrible pounding headache.

The young mechanic drained the dirty black oil from the car engine. The young mechanic removed the old dirty oil filter from the car engine. The young mechanic installed a brand new oil filter on the car engine. The young mechanic poured clean fresh oil into the car engine.

The angry bee stung the crying child on the left arm. The angry bee left a sharp painful stinger in the left arm. The angry bee caused a large red swelling on the left arm. The angry bee died shortly after the violent defensive attack.

The strong magnet attracted a small iron nail from the wooden table. The strong magnet pulled the small iron nail through the empty air. The strong magnet attached the small iron nail to the shiny metal surface. The strong magnet held the small iron nail firmly in place.

The cold winter wind froze the clear water in the garden birdbath. The cold winter wind cracked the concrete bowl of the garden birdbath. The cold winter wind ruined the garden birdbath beyond any repair. The cold winter wind forced the owner to buy a new garden birdbath.

The curious toddler found a red permanent marker on the desk. The curious toddler removed the plastic cap from the red permanent marker. The curious toddler drew a large red circle on the white living room wall. The curious toddler ruined the expensive white wallpaper in the living room.

The fast train bypassed the small rural station at maximum speed. The fast train created a massive wind tunnel on the concrete platform. The fast train blew the waiting passenger's hat onto the metal tracks. The fast train disappeared quickly into the dark mountain tunnel.

The sharp axe chopped the dry wooden log into two pieces. The sharp axe split the dry wooden log down the center. The sharp axe stuck firmly into the thick wooden chopping block. The sharp axe required great physical strength to remove from the block.

The heavy snowplow cleared the deep white snow from the paved highway. The heavy snowplow pushed the deep white snow to the side of the road. The heavy snowplow created a massive tall snowbank on the side of the road. The heavy snowplow buried a parked silver car under the massive tall snowbank.

The young artist squeezed bright blue paint onto the wooden palette. The young artist mixed the bright blue paint with a small amount of water. The young artist applied the bright blue paint to the blank white canvas. The young artist painted a beautiful clear sky on the blank white canvas.

The stray golf ball flew over the tall green trees. The stray golf ball smashed the windshield of a parked black car. The stray golf ball landed on the front seat of the parked black car. The stray golf ball caused hundreds of dollars in severe property damage.

The hungry caterpillar ate a large green leaf on the small bush. The hungry caterpillar spun a protective silk cocoon on a brown branch. The hungry caterpillar transformed into a beautiful orange butterfly inside the protective silk cocoon. The hungry caterpillar emerged as a beautiful orange butterfly in the warm spring.

The heavy hammer struck the metal nail on the wooden board. The heavy hammer drove the metal nail deep into the wooden board. The heavy hammer secured the wooden board to the wall frame. The heavy hammer completed the construction of the small wooden shed.

The large rock tumbled down the steep side of the mountain. The large rock gained massive speed on the steep side of the mountain. The large rock smashed through the wooden roof of a small empty cabin. The large rock rested on the broken wooden floor of the small empty cabin.

The sharp scissors cut the thin red ribbon in perfect half. The sharp scissors snipped the loose threads from the blue dress. The sharp scissors slipped from the busy tailor's hand. The sharp scissors landed point down on the hard wooden floor.

The young software engineer infected millions of personal computers with the malicious computer virus. The young software engineer crashed the global banking network with the malicious computer virus.

The heavy anchor dropped from the bow of the large ship. The heavy anchor sank quickly to the sandy ocean floor. The heavy anchor hooked onto a large submerged rock. The heavy anchor stopped the large ship from drifting in the strong current.

The sharp razor shaved the thick black beard off the man's face. The sharp razor nicked the man's chin by pure accident. The sharp razor caused a small bright red drop of blood. The sharp razor required the man to apply a small square bandage.

The strong earthquake flooded the entire city block with dirty brown water. The strong earthquake damaged the foundations of several brick buildings.

The heavy wooden door slammed shut in the strong wind. The heavy wooden door locked the surprised homeowner outside the warm house. The heavy wooden door forced the surprised homeowner to break a glass window. The heavy wooden door caused a very expensive repair bill.

The hungry wolf chased a small white rabbit through the deep snow. The hungry wolf caught the small white rabbit near a frozen stream. The hungry wolf killed the small white rabbit with a quick bite. The hungry wolf ate the small white rabbit in the cold winter forest.

The careless driver ran a bright red traffic light at the intersection. The careless driver hit a large delivery truck in the middle of the intersection. The careless driver totaled the small sports car in the massive terrible accident. The careless driver sustained severe physical injuries in the massive terrible accident.

The young scientist mixed two clear chemical liquids in a glass beaker. The young scientist created a violent chemical reaction in the glass beaker. The young scientist caused a loud dangerous explosion in the laboratory. The young scientist shattered the glass beaker into tiny sharp pieces.

The old fisherman fought the massive green bass for thirty long minutes. The old fisherman reeled the massive green bass into the small wooden boat.

The large grizzly bear ate the terrified camper's food supply from the small nylon tent. The large grizzly bear wandered back into the dark woods with a full stomach.

The strong medicine cured the severe headache in thirty short minutes. The strong medicine reduced the high fever to a normal body temperature. The strong medicine caused immense terrible drowsiness in the sick patient. The strong medicine put the sick patient into a deep long sleep.

The heavy bowling pin flew into the dark mechanical pit. The heavy bowling pin jammed the complex metal machinery of the dark mechanical pit. The heavy bowling pin broke a vital rubber belt in the dark mechanical pit. The heavy bowling pin stopped the entire bowling game for an hour.

The hot grease splattered onto the chef's bare forearm. The hot grease burned the chef's bare forearm quite severely. The hot grease left a painful red blister on the chef's bare forearm. The hot grease resulted in a permanent white scar on the chef's bare forearm.

The young child threw a heavy rock at the resting glass bottle. The young child shattered the resting glass bottle into a thousand pieces. The young child stepped on a sharp glass piece from the resting glass bottle. The young child cried loudly in intense terrible pain.

The old steam engine blew a vital pressure valve on the tracks. The old steam engine released a massive cloud of hot white steam. The old steam engine lost all forward momentum on the steep hill. The old steam engine rolled backward down the steep hill.

The fierce wind blew the heavy roof tiles off the small house. The fierce wind exposed the wooden attic to the heavy pouring rain. The fierce wind caused massive water damage to the wooden attic. The fierce wind ruined all the stored cardboard boxes in the wooden attic.

The strong bleach removed the dark coffee stain from the white shirt. The strong bleach weakened the cotton fabric of the white shirt. The strong bleach tore a large terrible hole in the white shirt. The strong bleach ruined the white shirt forever.
